title: Code review result
description: Schema that `claude -p` responses must conform to when used by the CI code-review gate.  The CI script passes this file via --json-schema; Claude Code retries internally until the output validates.

status.description: Final verdict.  'block' fails the CI job; 'warn' posts comments but does not fail; 'pass' is silent.

summary.description: One-paragraph human-readable summary suitable for a PR comment header.

issues.description: Zero or more concrete findings.  Each item is surfaced as a line-level PR comment.

line.description: 1-based line number where the issue occurs.

message.description: Reviewer-style comment, including the fix if obvious.

rule.description: Name of the rule file or convention that was violated, e.g. 'api-rules.authn'.
